prompt:
[Person] Refer to Image 1 and Image 2

[Pose and Expression]

At a beach festival scene where magnificent fireworks are unfolding, the subject is turned 90 degrees to the side while turning their head to face the camera directly. They have a subtle and elegant smile with the corners of their mouth slightly raised, showing mysterious and nostalgic eyes reflecting the light of the fireworks illuminating the night sky.

[Costume]

Wearing a traditional Japanese yukata with a subtle pastel lavender base, intricately engraved with bright white and deep purple floral patterns. A clean and vivid pink obi (belt) that harmonizes well with the top is neatly wrapped around the waist, providing an elegant point.

[Hairstyle and Makeup Details]

A low bun style with bangs naturally parted and swept to the side, and the hair neatly tied back. A large white flower-shaped hair ornament matching the yukata is attached to the side of the bun hair to add brightness. The makeup emphasizes pure and classic beauty by matching a subtle pink lip with transparent and moist skin expression.

[Lighting and Light Direction]

In the basic dim afterglow of the night, the intense golden lighting of the large fireworks exploding in the sky above the head creates colorful highlights along the person's hair, side of the face, and shoulder line. There is no direct lighting on the person's face.

[Texture and Color Mood]

The gorgeous golden fireworks filling the sky, the subtle purple of the yukata, and the pink obi blend together to create an extremely romantic and fantastic festival color mood. The contrast between the soft cotton texture of the yukata fabric and the sparkling fragment texture of the fireworks scattered in the night sky maximizes the dreamy atmosphere.

[Film and Camera Lens Depth, Angle]

Shot using an aperture of f/2.0, shutter speed of 1/125 second, ISO 800, and a 50mm standard prime lens. It is a front eye-level angle that captures the fireworks in the night sky in a balanced way, centering on the upper body of the person. In line with the night fireworks photography, the aperture was opened to focus precisely on the person, and the spectators in the background and the fireworks on the distant horizon were out-focused with beautiful and fluffy bokeh.

[Background Elements (Optional)]

A large-scale fireworks festival scene held at a summer night beach. Numerous golden fireworks are exploding hugely and magnificently in the night sky above the person's head, and another firework is rising near the sea horizon in the distance. Below on the sandy beach, numerous spectators are sitting and enjoying the festival, adding a sense of presence.

[Signature] A small Threads logo operated by Meta is located at the bottom right, with "CHAse" written in small white cursive like a signature above it.
